mapper.select: SELECT ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, ITEM_QNTY, REG_DT, ITEM_SE_CD, ITEM_CATE_CD, UNIT_PRICE, SELL_PRICE, UNIT_PRICE_NET, UNIT_PRICE_VAT, SELL_PRICE_NET, SELL_PRICE_VAT FROM TB_ITEM ORDER BY ITEM_CD
SELECT ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, ITEM_QNTY, REG_DT, ITEM_SE_CD, ITEM_CATE_CD, UNIT_PRICE, SELL_PRICE, UNIT_PRICE_NET, UNIT_PRICE_VAT, SELL_PRICE_NET, SELL_PRICE_VAT FROM TB_ITEM WHERE ITEM_CD = #{itemCd}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_ITEM ( ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, ITEM_QNTY, ITEM_SE_CD, ITEM_CATE_CD, UNIT_PRICE, SELL_PRICE, UNIT_PRICE_NET, UNIT_PRICE_VAT, SELL_PRICE_NET, SELL_PRICE_VAT ) VALUES ( #{itemCd}, #{itemNm}, #{itemQnty}, #{itemSeCd}, #{itemCateCd}, #{unitPrice}, #{sellPrice}, #{unitPriceNet}, #{unitPriceVat}, #{sellPriceNet}, #{sellPriceVat} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_ITEM SET ITEM_NM = #{itemNm}, ITEM_QNTY = #{itemQnty}, ITEM_SE_CD = #{itemSeCd}, ITEM_CATE_CD = #{itemCateCd}, UNIT_PRICE = #{unitPrice}, SELL_PRICE = #{sellPrice}, UNIT_PRICE_NET = #{unitPriceNet}, UNIT_PRICE_VAT = #{unitPriceVat}, SELL_PRICE_NET = #{sellPriceNet}, SELL_PRICE_VAT = #{sellPriceVat} WHERE ITEM_CD = #{itemCd}
